raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California Public Utilities Commission (CPUC) voted to raise monthly utility bills by adding a fixed charge of more than $24 per month.",
    "Senator Ochoa Bogh described the proposed uncapped fixed charge on electrical bills as a deeply concerning fee.",
    "The fixed charge on electrical bills can be increased at any point by the unelected board of the CPUC.",
    "The proposed increases in gas prices by the California Air Resources Board (CARB) are potentially devastating for Californians.",
    "Legislative Republicans called on the California Air Resources Board to be honest and transparent about the impact of a series of proposed regulations on California's gas prices."
  ]
```
